properties: I can find some information on Uragoga sambucina. Uragoga sambucina is a plant known to possess various therapeutic properties. Uragoga sambucina has been traditionally used to treat ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. side_effects: Uragoga sambucina, also known as poison pipe, is a plant that contains toxic compounds which can cause severe side effects. Ingestion of the plant can lead to symptoms such as nausea, vomiting, and abdominal pain. The toxic compounds in Uragoga sambucina can also cause cardiac and respiratory problems, and in severe cases, it can be fatal. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can lead to kidney and liver damage. If ingested, it is essential to seek medical attention immediately to avoid severe health complications.
